headline: Founder Push And New Tech Put Lululemon Governance And Growth In Focus
summary: Founder Chip Wilson has launched a public campaign calling for board changes and a leadership overhaul at lululemon athletica (NasdaqGS:LULU), including a proposed slate of new directors and a dedicated campaign website. At the same time, Lululemon has introduced its ShowZero sweat-concealing technology, created in partnership with tennis player Frances Tiafoe and scheduled to debut at a major tournament. Lululemon athletica, best known for premium athletic and lifestyle apparel, is now...
